nodes.name: Manual JSON Input
nodes.label: Manual JSON Input
nodes.description: Create JSON items manually for debugging and automation workflows.

nodes.name: Upload CSV/Excel
nodes.label: Upload CSV/Excel
nodes.description: Load an uploaded CSV, TSV, XLS, or XLSX dataset as a dataframe.

settingsSchema.name: dataset_id
settingsSchema.label: Dataset
settingsSchema.help: Uploaded dataset to load. Falls back to workflow dataset.

settingsSchema.name: id_column
settingsSchema.label: ID Column
settingsSchema.help: Optional unique row identifier column for joins, matching, filtering, and anomaly reports.

settingsSchema.name: require_unique_id
settingsSchema.label: Require Unique ID
settingsSchema.help: When enabled, the selected ID column must have no missing or duplicate values.

params.name: dataset_id
params.label: Dataset
params.help: Uploaded dataset to load. Falls back to workflow dataset.

params.name: id_column
params.label: ID Column
params.help: Optional unique row identifier column for joins, matching, filtering, and anomaly reports.

params.name: require_unique_id
params.label: Require Unique ID
params.help: When enabled, the selected ID column must have no missing or duplicate values.

nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.label: Manual Trigger
nodes.description: Starts a workflow manually without requiring upstream input.

nodes.name: Data Description
nodes.label: Data Description
nodes.description: Returns the pandas describe() table for the connected dataframe.

nodes.name: Missing Values Report
nodes.label: Missing Values Report
nodes.description: Calculates missing count and missing percent for each column.

nodes.name: Correlation Matrix
nodes.label: Correlation Matrix
nodes.description: Calculates a correlation matrix for selected numeric columns.

settingsSchema.name: max_plot_columns
settingsSchema.label: Max Plot Columns
settingsSchema.help: Limits the heatmap only. The table still contains the selected columns.

params.name: max_plot_columns
params.label: Max Plot Columns
params.help: Limits the heatmap only. The table still contains the selected columns.

nodes.name: Statistical Report
nodes.label: Statistical Report
nodes.description: Calculates selected statistical metrics for selected columns.

nodes.name: Duplicate Sample Error
nodes.label: Duplicate Sample Error
nodes.description: Calculates laboratory and geochemical duplicate-pair error metrics from a raw-to-duplicate ID mapping table.

settingsSchema.name: mapping_file
settingsSchema.label: Raw / Duplicate Mapping
settingsSchema.help: CSV, TSV, or XLSX with one raw ID column and one duplicate ID column.

settingsSchema.name: mapping_raw_column
settingsSchema.label: Raw Sample Mapping Column
settingsSchema.help: Leave blank to use the first mapping column.

settingsSchema.name: mapping_duplicate_column
settingsSchema.label: Duplicate Sample Mapping Column
settingsSchema.help: Leave blank to use the second mapping column.

settingsSchema.name: dataframe_id_column
settingsSchema.label: DataFrame Sample ID Column
settingsSchema.help: The ID column in the connected dataframe. It may differ from the ID selected in the CSV input node.

settingsSchema.name: columns
settingsSchema.label: Analyte / Measurement Columns
settingsSchema.help: Numeric columns for duplicate error calculation.

params.name: mapping_file
params.label: Raw / Duplicate Mapping
params.help: CSV, TSV, or XLSX with one raw ID column and one duplicate ID column.

params.name: mapping_raw_column
params.label: Raw Sample Mapping Column
params.help: Leave blank to use the first mapping column.

params.name: mapping_duplicate_column
params.label: Duplicate Sample Mapping Column
params.help: Leave blank to use the second mapping column.

params.name: dataframe_id_column
params.label: DataFrame Sample ID Column
params.help: The ID column in the connected dataframe. It may differ from the ID selected in the CSV input node.

params.name: columns
params.label: Analyte / Measurement Columns
params.help: Numeric columns for duplicate error calculation.

nodes.name: Convert Column Type
nodes.label: Convert Column Type
nodes.description: Converts selected columns to numeric, text, boolean, or datetime.

nodes.name: Select Rows / Columns
nodes.label: Select Rows / Columns
nodes.description: Selects or drops dataframe columns and optionally filters rows before passing the dataframe forward.

settingsSchema.name: row_query
settingsSchema.label: Row Query
settingsSchema.help: Optional pandas query, e.g. age > 30 and income < 100000

params.name: row_query
params.label: Row Query
params.help: Optional pandas query, e.g. age > 30 and income < 100000

nodes.name: Data Filter
nodes.label: Data Filter
nodes.description: Filters rows or columns using a simple condition, pandas query, or a JSON report from another node.

settingsSchema.name: row_query
settingsSchema.label: Row Query
settingsSchema.help: Optional pandas query. If set, it is applied before the simple condition.

params.name: row_query
params.label: Row Query
params.help: Optional pandas query. If set, it is applied before the simple condition.

nodes.name: Replace Values
nodes.label: Replace Values
nodes.description: Replaces values in selected columns using one or more replacement blocks.

nodes.name: Imputation
nodes.label: Imputation
nodes.description: Imputes missing values using one or more method blocks.

nodes.name: Detection Limit Handling
nodes.label: Detection Limit Handling
nodes.description: Handles censored values using a detection-limit table.

nodes.name: Z-Score Outlier Detector
nodes.label: Z-Score Outlier Detector
nodes.description: Detects outliers per numeric column using one or more absolute z-score thresholds.

settingsSchema.name: thresholds
settingsSchema.label: Z Thresholds
settingsSchema.help: Comma-separated thresholds. Example: 3, 2

params.name: thresholds
params.label: Z Thresholds
params.help: Comma-separated thresholds. Example: 3, 2

nodes.name: IQR Outlier Detector
nodes.label: IQR Outlier Detector
nodes.description: Detects outliers per numeric column using one or more IQR multipliers.

settingsSchema.name: iqr_multipliers
settingsSchema.label: IQR Multipliers
settingsSchema.help: Comma-separated multipliers. Example: 1.5, 2.5

params.name: iqr_multipliers
params.label: IQR Multipliers
params.help: Comma-separated multipliers. Example: 1.5, 2.5

nodes.name: Threshold Anomaly Detector
nodes.label: Threshold Anomaly Detector
nodes.description: Detects anomalies for one numeric column using one or more thresholds.

settingsSchema.name: thresholds
settingsSchema.label: Thresholds
settingsSchema.help: Comma-separated thresholds. Example: 3, 2 or 1.5, 2.5

params.name: thresholds
params.label: Thresholds
params.help: Comma-separated thresholds. Example: 3, 2 or 1.5, 2.5

nodes.name: Sorted Gap Outlier
nodes.label: Sorted Gap Outlier
nodes.description: Detects abrupt low- or high-tail jumps in sorted numeric values and optionally coerces them to the nearest non-outlier boundary.

settingsSchema.name: sensitivity
settingsSchema.label: Gap Sensitivity
settingsSchema.help: Higher values detect only more abrupt tail jumps.

settingsSchema.name: max_outlier_fraction
settingsSchema.label: Maximum Outlier Fraction
settingsSchema.help: Maximum fraction considered at each tail.

params.name: sensitivity
params.label: Gap Sensitivity
params.help: Higher values detect only more abrupt tail jumps.

params.name: max_outlier_fraction
params.label: Maximum Outlier Fraction
params.help: Maximum fraction considered at each tail.

nodes.name: Scaler
nodes.label: Scaler
nodes.description: Scales selected numeric columns using the selected scaler method.

nodes.name: Normalization Blocks
nodes.label: Normalization Blocks
nodes.description: Normalizes selected columns using one or more method blocks.

nodes.name: Ratio Calculator
nodes.label: Ratio Calculator
nodes.description: Creates a new numeric column from numerator divided by denominator.

nodes.name: Transpose DataFrame
nodes.label: Transpose DataFrame
nodes.description: Uses one ID column as the new column names and transposes all remaining dataframe columns.

settingsSchema.name: id_column
settingsSchema.label: ID Column
settingsSchema.help: Values in this column become the transposed dataframe column names.

settingsSchema.name: first_column_name
settingsSchema.label: First Column Name
settingsSchema.help: Name of the first output column containing the original dataframe column names.

params.name: id_column
params.label: ID Column
params.help: Values in this column become the transposed dataframe column names.

params.name: first_column_name
params.label: First Column Name
params.help: Name of the first output column containing the original dataframe column names.

nodes.name: Histogram
nodes.label: Histogram
nodes.description: Creates one or more histogram plots for selected numeric columns.

settingsSchema.name: columns
settingsSchema.label: Columns
settingsSchema.help: Select one or more numeric columns.

params.name: columns
params.label: Columns
params.help: Select one or more numeric columns.

nodes.name: Scatter Plot
nodes.label: Scatter Plot
nodes.description: Creates one or more scatter plots from numeric column pairs.

settingsSchema.name: scatter_blocks
settingsSchema.label: Scatter Plot Blocks
settingsSchema.help: Add multiple X/Y scatter plot blocks in one node.

params.name: scatter_blocks
params.label: Scatter Plot Blocks
params.help: Add multiple X/Y scatter plot blocks in one node.

nodes.name: Box Plot
nodes.label: Box Plot
nodes.description: Creates one or more box plot statistic panels for selected numeric columns.

settingsSchema.name: columns
settingsSchema.label: Columns
settingsSchema.help: Select one or more numeric columns.

params.name: columns
params.label: Columns
params.help: Select one or more numeric columns.

nodes.name: Bar Plot
nodes.label: Bar Plot
nodes.description: Uses selected dataframe columns as X labels and selected rows, identified by the first dataframe column, as bar series.

settingsSchema.name: x_columns
settingsSchema.label: X-axis Columns
settingsSchema.help: Each selected dataframe column becomes one X-axis label.

settingsSchema.name: selected_rows
settingsSchema.label: Y-axis Rows
settingsSchema.help: Rows are identified by values in the first dataframe column. Each selected row becomes one bar series.

settingsSchema.name: series_colors
settingsSchema.label: Series Colors
settingsSchema.help: Choose one color for each selected row series.

settingsSchema.name: guideline_values
settingsSchema.label: Guideline Values
settingsSchema.help: Optional comma-separated guideline values such as 10, 20.

settingsSchema.name: guideline_labels
settingsSchema.label: Guideline Labels
settingsSchema.help: Optional comma-separated labels in the same order.

params.name: x_columns
params.label: X-axis Columns
params.help: Each selected dataframe column becomes one X-axis label.

params.name: selected_rows
params.label: Y-axis Rows
params.help: Rows are identified by values in the first dataframe column. Each selected row becomes one bar series.

params.name: series_colors
params.label: Series Colors
params.help: Choose one color for each selected row series.

params.name: guideline_values
params.label: Guideline Values
params.help: Optional comma-separated guideline values such as 10, 20.

params.name: guideline_labels
params.label: Guideline Labels
params.help: Optional comma-separated labels in the same order.

nodes.name: P-P Plot
nodes.label: P-P Plot
nodes.description: Creates normal probability-probability plots for one or more numeric columns with an x=y reference line.

nodes.name: Select Features & Target
nodes.label: Select Features & Target
nodes.description: Selects one target column and multiple feature columns for model training.

nodes.name: Train/Test Split
nodes.label: Train/Test Split
nodes.description: Splits selected features and target into X_train, X_test, y_train, and y_test.

nodes.name: K-Fold Split
nodes.label: K-Fold Split
nodes.description: Creates K-fold train/test data pairs for model training and validation.

nodes.name: Set Target Column
nodes.label: Set Target Column
nodes.description: Stores the target column name for downstream model nodes.

nodes.name: Mutual Information Scores
nodes.label: Mutual Information Scores
nodes.description: Scores features using mutual information and outputs a sortable bar plot plus score table.

nodes.name: F-Regression Scores
nodes.label: F-Regression Scores
nodes.description: Scores regression features using sklearn f_regression and outputs a bar plot plus table.

nodes.name: Linear Regression
nodes.label: Linear Regression
nodes.description: Trains a linear regression model.

nodes.name: Ridge Regression
nodes.label: Ridge Regression
nodes.description: Trains ridge regression with L2 regularization.

nodes.name: Lasso Regression
nodes.label: Lasso Regression
nodes.description: Trains lasso regression with L1 regularization.

nodes.name: ElasticNet Regression
nodes.label: ElasticNet Regression
nodes.description: Trains elastic-net regression.

nodes.name: Decision Tree Regressor
nodes.label: Decision Tree Regressor
nodes.description: Trains a decision-tree regressor.

nodes.name: Random Forest Regressor
nodes.label: Random Forest Regressor
nodes.description: Trains a random-forest regressor.

nodes.name: Extra Trees Regressor
nodes.label: Extra Trees Regressor
nodes.description: Trains an extra-trees regressor.

nodes.name: Gradient Boosting Regressor
nodes.label: Gradient Boosting Regressor
nodes.description: Trains a gradient-boosting regressor.

nodes.name: Hist Gradient Boosting Regressor
nodes.label: Hist Gradient Boosting Regressor
nodes.description: Trains a histogram gradient-boosting regressor.

nodes.name: KNN Regressor
nodes.label: KNN Regressor
nodes.description: Trains a k-nearest-neighbors regressor.

nodes.label: Logistic Regression Classifier
nodes.description: Trains a logistic-regression classifier.

nodes.name: Decision Tree Classifier
nodes.label: Decision Tree Classifier
nodes.description: Trains a decision-tree classifier.

nodes.name: Random Forest Classifier
nodes.label: Random Forest Classifier
nodes.description: Trains a random-forest classifier.

nodes.name: Extra Trees Classifier
nodes.label: Extra Trees Classifier
nodes.description: Trains an extra-trees classifier.

nodes.name: Gradient Boosting Classifier
nodes.label: Gradient Boosting Classifier
nodes.description: Trains a gradient-boosting classifier.

nodes.name: Hist Gradient Boosting Classifier
nodes.label: Hist Gradient Boosting Classifier
nodes.description: Trains a histogram gradient-boosting classifier.

nodes.name: KNN Classifier
nodes.label: KNN Classifier
nodes.description: Trains a k-nearest-neighbors classifier.

nodes.name: SVC Classifier

nodes.description: Trains a support-vector classifier.

nodes.name: Gaussian NB Classifier
nodes.label: Gaussian NB Classifier
nodes.description: Trains a Gaussian Naive Bayes classifier.

nodes.name: Prediction Plot
nodes.label: Prediction Plot
nodes.description: Predicts a selected data pair and plots actual values against predictions.

nodes.name: Model Validation
nodes.label: Model Validation
nodes.description: Validates a trained model on train/test/fold or externally connected data pairs.

nodes.name: Feature Importance
nodes.label: Feature Importance
nodes.description: Displays feature importances or linear coefficients when available.

nodes.name: Export CSV
nodes.label: Export CSV
nodes.description: Writes the incoming dataframe to a CSV artifact.

nodes.name: Export JSON
nodes.label: Export JSON
nodes.description: Writes the incoming dataframe to a JSON artifact.

nodes.name: Simple Report
nodes.label: Simple Report
nodes.description: Creates a lightweight JSON report from the incoming dataframe.

nodes.name: Python Code
nodes.label: Python Code
nodes.description: Runs restricted Python code over input JSON/table preview data.

nodes.name: Pass Through
nodes.label: Pass Through
nodes.description: Passes dataframe or JSON input through unchanged.

nodes.name: Merge DataFrames
nodes.label: Merge DataFrames
nodes.description: Concatenates or joins two incoming dataframes.
